name: consolidated safeguards script emits one structured JSON Lines record per fired flag for downstream parsing
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus && printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","supporting_prs":[]}\n' > pat.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/safeguards.sh" --pattern pat.json --all-checks --log .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/poison-flags.jsonl 2>err.txt && [ -f .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/poison-flags.jsonl ] && node -e "const lines=require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/poison-flags.jsonl','utf8').trim().split('\n').filter(Boolean);for(const l of lines){const o=JSON.parse(l);if(!o.flag||!o.pattern_id)process.exit(1);}" && echo ok 1>&2
